channel.title: Casa Caravan — The Garden
channel.description: A night garden with live chat, real moon phase, ambient sounds and radio. A place to rest on the internet.

item.title: The Garden — Real Moon Phase, Live Chat, Ambient Sounds
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description: A night garden open to all. The moon shows today's real lunar phase — calculated from astronomical data in real time (synodic month, canvas-rendered). Ambient forest sounds, live chat with others in the garden, three radio stations. Star Observatory with nebula animation. Forest path with runic markers. No account required. casacaravan.space/garden.html
